name: Hoxhunt
description: Hoxhunt phishing simulation and security awareness training platform for measuring and improving employee security behavior

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Hoxhunt admin dashboard
2. Go to Settings > API or contact your Hoxhunt account manager to request an API token
3. Copy your API token and enter it above
4. More info: https://support.hoxhunt.com/hc/en-us/categories/16473071192732-Technical-corner

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verify users are enrolled in Hoxhunt security awareness training

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Monitor phishing incidents reported through Hoxhunt

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Monitor real phishing threats reported and analyzed by Hoxhunt

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verify Hoxhunt security awareness training platform is active and employees are being trained on phishing, social engineering, and credential protection
